caption: A man is seated in a room decorated with framed photographs and clothing racks, speaking into a professional microphone. He is wearing a green t-shirt with the text "ION NEVERZ" and "SUT" visible on the front, a green baseball cap, and black headphones. To his right, a white mannequin wears a white long-sleeved shirt. The background features several framed pictures on the wall and a rack of colorful clothing. In the lower-left corner of the scene, a logo reads "THE PODCAST", and in the lower-right corner, red text reads "ROCKY FLY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man’s expression shifts from a neutral look to a wide smile, showing his teeth as he continues to speak. His head tilts slightly while he maintains his position in front of the microphone.
